'''鈭歵h-k-w-v''' ('''kathakwevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruff|ruff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruff|ruff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-k-w-v
|-
! Lemma
| kathakwevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithakwevoko|thithakwevoko]] || [[word:jithakwevoko|jithakwevoko]] || [[word:shithakwevoko|shithakwevoko]] || [[word:kithakwevoko|kithakwevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthakwevoko|thuthuthakwevoko]] || [[word:jujuthakwevoko|jujuthakwevoko]] || [[word:shushuthakwevoko|shushuthakwevoko]] || [[word:kukuthakwevoko|kukuthakwevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthakwevoko|thuthakwevoko]] || [[word:juthakwevoko|juthakwevoko]] || [[word:shuthakwevoko|shuthakwevoko]] || [[word:kuthakwevoko|kuthakwevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthakwevoko|thuthakwevoko]] || [[word:juthakwevoko|juthakwevoko]] || [[word:shuthakwevoko|shuthakwevoko]] || [[word:kuthakwevoko|kuthakwevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethakwevoko|thethakwevoko]] || [[word:jethakwevoko|jethakwevoko]] || [[word:shethakwevoko|shethakwevoko]] || [[word:kethakwevoko|kethakwevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothakwevoko|thothothakwevoko]] || [[word:jojothakwevoko|jojothakwevoko]] || [[word:shoshothakwevoko|shoshothakwevoko]] || [[word:kokothakwevoko|kokothakwevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothakwevoko|thothakwevoko]] || [[word:jothakwevoko|jothakwevoko]] || [[word:shothakwevoko|shothakwevoko]] || [[word:kothakwevoko|kothakwevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothakwevoko|thothakwevoko]] || [[word:jothakwevoko|jothakwevoko]] || [[word:shothakwevoko|shothakwevoko]] || [[word:kothakwevoko|kothakwevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thakwevoko|th忙thakwevoko]] || [[word:j忙thakwevoko|j忙thakwevoko]] || [[word:sh忙thakwevoko|sh忙thakwevoko]] || [[word:k忙thakwevoko|k忙thakwevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathakwevoko|thathathakwevoko]] || [[word:jajathakwevoko|jajathakwevoko]] || [[word:shashathakwevoko|shashathakwevoko]] || [[word:kakathakwevoko|kakathakwevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathakwevoko|thathakwevoko]] || [[word:jathakwevoko|jathakwevoko]] || [[word:shathakwevoko|shathakwevoko]] || [[word:kathakwevoko|kathakwevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathakwevoko|thathakwevoko]] || [[word:jathakwevoko|jathakwevoko]] || [[word:shathakwevoko|shathakwevoko]] || [[word:kathakwevoko|kathakwevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
